reason_for_decision: Detailed, technically credible, and strong at converting image-quality theory into task-based range estimation logic.
strengths: Frames identification correctly as a task definition problem before it becomes a geometry calculation.
Handles people, vehicles, and small craft as genuinely different target classes rather than treating them as one object type.
Combines pixels-on-target logic with stabilization, atmosphere, and workflow derating in a way that creates strong buyer guidance.
summary_assessment: A high-quality technical explainer with good image-quality reasoning, strong practical estimation guidance, and clear deployment realism.
